title: Duck's Mega Overhaul
description: This modpack is the predecessor of Mc Overhaul and is way better than mc overhaul
body:
### Duck's Mega Overhaul![Mega Overhaul logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94b7e37ad7946e578c1232a8da60ad0b12fa18b6.png)

## About Mega Overhaul

Duck's Mega Overhaul is the predecessor to Mc Overhaul, it changes the way Minecraft is, same like in MC Overhaul. Not only that it have fewer mods than MC Overhaul, which has 310 mods compared to Mega Overhaul and its 280 Mods, it runs better!![In game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f614504354ff81a6e3d139ee12ce312336a06564_0.webp)


## Tide By Lightning64

Tide adds 60+ fish and new fishing rods to MC, and in Mega Overhaul, it's no different since Mega Overhaul is about exploring, Tide fits in perfectly making exploreing in the ocean funnier and if you want to keep track of the fishes you find it adds its journals in which you can see what fishes you find trough out the time your exploreing the world!
![fishing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5904f2f09456677752f43d19996ef2b0282cca18_0.webp)


## Find Different Biomes To Build In And Explore

Mega Overhaul adds mods that add new structures and biomes to Minecraft, making it so there are new blocks to build with. As you explore the world of Minecraft in Mega Overhaul, you can find new biomes and structures so you can build and have fun with. Find And Explore, and using Another Furniture made by Starfish Studios, Crispytwig, Synthestra building goes to a whole other level
![sunset snowy town](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a5e612140604f69e2e74f2862a2985b2cbe0b7a_0.webp)
![better view of snowy town](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c38a8882648e30465c185522b1f502928d33197_0.webp)


## Next Couple Of Updates And Thanks

The Coming Update will give Mega Overhaul new stuff and better proformece in the next upcoming updates i Been Working On This Modpack for a long time and went trough trail and error making Mega Overhaul so i hope you guys like it if you guys come across any bugs/glitchs please let me know in the github or the in the [Discord]([https://discord.gg/vUyVnban](https://discord.gg/ftR2FXVHxD)). Yet Again, Thank You For Downloading My Modpacks!!!!
![Thank you](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9c5cd6426583a1f34078c9a53f0709ad606cba1_0.webp)





### Copyright Info And Credit
Thanks to every creator of the mods inside this mod pack. If it weren't for them, we wouldn't have any mods to use. Copyright: You can only give links to my mod packs and mods, but you can't make a profit, nor claim it's yours.
